Headline: #18 16th/18th Temporary Reroute at 16th/Kedzie
ShortDescription: 18 16th/18th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via due to street blockage near 16th/Kedzie

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#18 16th/18th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via due to street blockage near 16th/Kedzie

Eastbound buses will operate via 16th, Kedzie, Ogden,16th and over normal route

Westbound buses will operate via Ogden, Kedzie,16th and over normal route

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #85A North Central and #92 Foster Temporary Reroute near Foster/Cicero
ShortDescription: 85A North Central and 92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Foster/Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85A North Central and #92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Foster/Cicero.

#85A North Central buses will operate in both directions via Cicero, Lawrence, Pulaski, Peterson, Cicero and over normal route. 

#92 Foster buses will operate in both directions via Foster, Pulaski, Lawrence, Elston, Foster and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
